title: ws: ChatStreamEnable and ChatStreamDisable
description:
Implement ChatStreamEnable and ChatStreamDisable message send in ws/connection.rs:
- Send ChatStreamEnable on connect with initial chatIds list (from open chat views)
- Send ChatStreamDisable when leaving a chat context
- On reconnect, re-send ChatStreamEnable (session-scoped; not persisted by server)
- chatIds is a view-management filter — callers must keep it in sync with currently-open chats
- Define message types per types.rs WebSocket/Push message types issue
- Tests: assert correct JSON shape is sent
close_reason: Epic complete: WebSocket transport client implemented, reviewed, and all review issues resolved
